semantic.role: Global LLM configuration and secrets manager for the ArchSpine CLI tool. Provides platform-aware directory detection, persistent config loading/saving, and credential management via a CredentialStore.
responsibilities: Determine the global ArchSpine directory path based on OS convention (Windows: %APPDATA%, Unix: XDG_CONFIG_HOME or ~/.config).
Load and parse global LLM configuration (provider, model, baseURL) from a JSON file, with fallback defaults.
Persist configuration changes (setProvider, setModel, setBaseURL) back to the JSON file.
Manage LLM API secrets (API keys, etc.) through a CredentialStore, providing getSecret/setSecret/deleteSecret operations.
Expose an interface (GlobalLLMConfigShape) for type-safe consumption of configuration.
outOfScope: Direct file I/O error handling (console.warn on parse failure is a fallback, not a public contract).
Credential storage backend implementation (delegated to CredentialStore/CredentialBackend).
Platform-specific directory fallback details beyond the public function getGlobalArchSpineDir.
invariants: The global config directory is determined deterministically per platform and can be retrieved via getGlobalArchSpineDir.
Configuration file (config.json) is always stored inside the global directory and is JSON-encoded.
Secrets (API keys) are never stored inline in the config JSON; they are managed exclusively via the CredentialStore.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Centralize global LLM configuration and secret management to avoid scattered file reads/writes and improve testability.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Synchronized with release gate fixes — likely refined config path resolution and credential store integration for cross-platform compatibility.

publicSurface.description: Returns the absolute path to the platform-specific global ArchSpine data directory (e.g., ~/.config/archspine).
Interface defining the optional shape of the global LLM configuration (provider, model, baseURL).
Class that loads, mutates, and persists the global LLM configuration to a JSON file in the global directory.
Class that manages LLM credential secrets (API keys) using a CredentialStore for secure storage and retrieval.

English.role: Global LLM configuration and secrets manager for the ArchSpine CLI tool. It determines the platform-specific data directory, persists LLM provider settings to a JSON file, and manages sensitive credentials securely through a dedicated credential store.
responsibilities: Resolve the global ArchSpine directory path depending on the operating system (Windows: %APPDATA%, Unix: XDG_CONFIG_HOME or ~/.config).
Load the global LLM configuration (provider, model, base URL) from a JSON file, providing sensible defaults when the file is absent.
Write configuration changes back to the JSON file after modification by the user.
Manage LLM API secrets (e.g., API keys) through a dedicated CredentialStore, with operations to read, write, and delete secrets.
Publish a TypeScript interface (GlobalLLMConfigShape) for type-safe access to the configuration structure.
outOfScope: Low-level file I/O error handling, beyond emitting a warning on parse failure.
The credential storage backend implementation, which is fully delegated to the CredentialStore and CredentialBackend classes.
Platform-specific edge cases in directory resolution, which are encapsulated by getGlobalArchSpineDir.
